title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz Life in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
